---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible defect in Zero
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Type '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages shown in the UI or in the DevTools console (`Ctrl+Shift+I`).

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | Windows 11 / Windows 10 (version?) |
| Zero version | (shown in Settings → About) |
| Ollama version | (`ollama --version`) |
| Node.js version | (`node --version`) |
| Ollama model in use | (e.g. `mistral`, `codellama`) |
| Using OpenRouter fallback? | Yes / No |

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. If the bug only happens with a specific prompt or input, include it here.
